title: NotebookLM Slide Mission
description: A spy mission to create slides with NotebookLM!

scenes.speech: Agent, can you hear me? Let's start the mission briefing now! 🕵️
scenes.title: Mission Directive!
scenes.content: Mission: Create a slide using NotebookLM! Choose one theme you'd like to explore and summarize it into a 3-page slide.

scenes.speech: NotebookLM is the 'ultimate tool for organizing information'!
scenes.title: Tool Explanation
scenes.content: When you input data (text, URL, etc.) into NotebookLM, AI analyzes the content for you.
scenes.highlight:
How to use NotebookLM:
1. Open notebooklm.google.com
2. Create a new notebook
3. Add materials
4. Ask AI for help

scenes.speech: Choosing a theme is your first mission!
scenes.title: Choose a Theme
scenes.content: Pick a theme you'd like to introduce in your slide. Anything you're interested in is okay!
scenes.highlight:
Theme examples:
・ Secrets of your favorite animal
・ Wonders of the universe
・ Global warming
・ History of your favorite game

scenes.speech: Let's send this prompt to NotebookLM!
scenes.title: Operation Execution!
scenes.content: Open NotebookLM, add materials, and then use the prompt below to create a slide!
scenes.highlight:
Usable prompts:
「Make a 3-page slide for elementary school students.
 Write a heading and a short explanation for each page.」

scenes.speech: Once you have your slide, let's check the completion conditions!
scenes.title: Clear Conditions Check
scenes.content: To clear the mission, check these three conditions!
scenes.highlight:
Clear conditions:
□ A 3-page slide plan is complete
□ Difficult words are rephrased in simpler terms
□ Your opinion is included at the end

scenes.title: Slide Structure
scenes.content: State the message, explain it, restate it. Simple but strong.

scenes.title: Use Animation Wisely
scenes.content: Limit animation to one per slide. Too much hurts readability; restraint creates impact.
scenes.highlight:
Anim rules:
- 1 per slide
- Only with meaning
- Avoid flashy

scenes.speech: Mission accomplished! Submit a screenshot and get 300 points! 🎯
scenes.title: Mission Completion Report
scenes.content: Great job! Once your slide is complete, submit an image or text to Slack to get your points!
